block_00: Top Up Your Account Quickly and Easily!
block_04: We’ve got great news — from now on, traders from Malaysia can replenish trading accounts via DUITNOW — a new QR method for convenient deposits. The new method is already switched on in IQ Option web and mobile applications and has a limit up to MYR 10,000 per transaction.
block_06: Log into your IQ Option account
block_09: Select DUITNOW method from the list, enter the amount, and proceed to payment
block_10: Scan the generated QR code and make the payment within 1 minute frame
block_11: Top up your account in the blink of an eye!
block_13: We wish you a fantastic trading experience!👏
